author: Pixar YouTube
text:
ASMRchives "Up": Ellie's Chair
Take a listen as Pixar Archivists along with Bryn Imagire, unbox Bryn's practical model of Ellie’s chair created for Pixar's feature film, UP (2009). Headphones are recommended for the best audio experience!

author: Pixar YouTube
text:
Toy Story 5: "Smarty Pants Needs Batteries!" BTS | Pixar's Set the Scene
'Toy Story 5" filmmakers break down "The Drawer" scene in which Jessie
seeks out spare batteries for Smarty Pants! Directors Andrew Stanton,
Kenna Harris, and Producer Lindsey Collins give an exclusive behind
the scenes look at storyboards, clips, concept art, and more from the
all new TOY STORY 5, now in theaters!
